mapper.select: Select a.id, -- 주문_ID a.order_number, -- 주문번호 a.ordered_at, -- 주문일시 a.channel_id, ( Select x.name From channels x Where 1 = 1 And x.id = a.channel_id ) channel_name, -- 채널명 a.status, -- 주문상태 a.customer_name, -- 주문자 a.customer_phone, -- 주문자 연락처 a.customer_email, -- 주문자이메일 a.payment_status, -- 결제상태 a.final_price, -- 결제금액 a.payment_method, -- 결제수단 a.paid_at, -- 결제일시 a.canceled_at, -- 취소일시 a.total_price, -- 상품총금액 a.discount_price, -- 할인금액 a.all_ticket_used, -- 모든티켓사용여부 ( select SUM(x.quantity) from order_items x Where 1 = 1 And x.order_id = a.ID ) all_cnt, -- 상품개수 ( select count(*) from order_tickets x Join order_items y On x.order_item_id = y.id Where 1 = 1 And y.order_id = a.ID And x.ticket_used = true ) USED_TICKET_CNT, -- 사용티켓수 a.benepia_id, -- 베네피아id a.memo -- 요청사항 FROM orders a WHERE DATE(a.ordered_at) = #{targetDate} AND a.channel_id = '1e477aeb-2548-4bfb-80ff-e5b7ebdaa7d9' And a.benepia_id Is Not Null ORDER BY a.ordered_at ASC

Select a.id, -- 주문_ID a.order_number, -- 주문번호 a.ordered_at, -- 주문일시 a.channel_id, ( Select x.name From channels x Where 1 = 1 And x.id = a.channel_id ) channel_name, -- 채널명 a.status, -- 주문상태 a.customer_name, -- 주문자 a.customer_phone, -- 주문자 연락처 a.customer_email, -- 주문자이메일 a.payment_status, -- 결제상태 a.final_price, -- 결제금액 a.payment_method, -- 결제수단 a.paid_at, -- 결제일시 a.canceled_at, -- 취소일시 a.total_price, -- 상품총금액 a.discount_price, -- 할인금액 a.all_ticket_used, -- 모든티켓사용여부 ( select SUM(x.quantity) from order_items x Where 1 = 1 And x.order_id = a.ID ) all_cnt, -- 상품개수 ( select count(*) from order_tickets x Join order_items y On x.order_item_id = y.id Where 1 = 1 And y.order_id = a.ID And x.ticket_used = true ) USED_TICKET_CNT, -- 사용티켓수 a.benepia_id, -- 베네피아id a.memo -- 요청사항 FROM orders a WHERE DATE(a.canceled_at) = #{targetDate} AND a.channel_id = '1e477aeb-2548-4bfb-80ff-e5b7ebdaa7d9' AND a.payment_status = 'CANCELED' And a.benepia_id Is Not Null ORDER BY a.ordered_at ASC

Select a.id, -- 주문상품_ID a.product_id, -- 상품ID a.product_name, -- 상품명 (Select x.name From menu_categories x Join Products y On x.id = y.category_id where 1 = 1 And y.id = a.product_id) category_name, -- 카테고리명 d.name partner_name, -- 파트너명 d.id partner_id, -- 파트너id STRING_AGG(e.option_value, ' ' ORDER BY e.id) option_name, -- 옵션명 a.quantity, a.unit_price, a.total_price FROM order_items a JOIN orders b ON b.id = a.order_id JOIN products c ON c.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN partners d ON d.id = c.partner_id LEFT JOIN order_item_options e ON e.order_item_id = a.id Where 1 = 1 And a.order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY a.id, a.product_name, d.name, d.id, a.quantity, a.unit_price, a.total_price
